title: Chairman; other officers
doc_html:
§33.  Chairman; other officers

The commission shall select from its members a chairman and such other officers as it deems necessary.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 152, §1.

§33.  Chairman; other officers
The commission shall select from its members a chairman and such other officers as it deems necessary.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 152, §1.
